center.name: 里約布蘭科
center.summary: 里約布蘭科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-faced cotinga，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-faced cotinga (Conioptilon mcilhennyi) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-faced cotinga (Conioptilon mcilhennyi) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J
